title: Stohun's Vanity Collection
description: Packs for Vanity. Tools, Weapons, Helmets, Shields in different styles.
body:
![Overview of all designs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b46f0dbe223d07ca5db149623687f2e77281782.png)

A collection of Vanity Packs to turn your tools, weapons, helmets, and shields into different styles. Includes Bone, Molten, Spectral, Viking, Black Gold, Spartan, Steel, Valkyrie, Druid, and Helios.

Designs are sold by the Stylist Villager and can be applied to gear of any material. This includes modded items with the appropriate tags. Armor trims can only be applied to helmets using the Bone, Steel or Black Gold designs.

Requires [Vanity: Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanity-core) and [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

Knives from Farmer's Delight are supported.
